data.title: Andrew Left's Citron Research Warns Gorilla Technology's Woes Are 'Just The Tip Of The Iceberg:' 'Recent Retail Investor Enthusiasm... May Be Premature'
data.description: Activist short seller Andrew Left's Citron Research warned investors about Gorilla Technology Group Inc. on Thursday, stating on X that concerns about the company are "just the tip of the iceberg."

data.title: Google Is Testing Circular And Pill-Shaped Gboard Keys: But Do You Actually Want Them?
data.description: Google is testing circular and pill-shaped keys in a Gboard beta update, but user feedback will determine if this change becomes permanent.

data.title: DOGE Staffers Reportedly Draw Hefty Salaries Funded By Taxpayers While Elon Musk Pushes For 'Wasteful' Spending Cuts
data.description: Employees of the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), an initiative overseen by Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk, are reportedly drawing substantial salaries while they are downsizing federal agencies.

data.title: Nasdaq 100 To Enter Bear Market Territory? Next Two Weeks Crucial As 3.5% Fall Following Correction Can Make It A Reality, Warns Analyst
data.description: As Nasdaq 100 entered correction zone, this analyst has warned that another 3.5% fall in next 2 weeks will lead to the bear market territory.

data.title: Canadian PM Justin Trudeau Retaliates With 25% Tariffs On US Goods Amid Escalating Trade War (CORRECTED)
data.description: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau has announced a 25% tariff on $155 billion worth of U.S. goods. This decision comes as a direct response to the 25% tariffs imposed by U.S. President Donald Trump on Canadian goods, as reported by BNN Bloomberg.
